title: Weapons 'N' additions
description: [WIP] [Paused] Adds various unique weapons and hopefully fun and original mechanics
body:
**🚧 Mod description still under construction 🚧**
### [As I am learning java the mod will be remade from the ground up, in the meantime it won't be updated]

Weapons 'N' Additions is a mod that aims to bring various unique weapons for after (or even before) the vanilla end game in an idealy new and original way.



Version 1.x "Purple haze":

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

###   -Amethyst powder:


![amethyst powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b8731f020d11d857cb3b11e0b93d6f0bc7eeec2.png)

Obtaining: dropped by budding amethyst

It's not recommended to inhale it, as it's still hard rocks

###   -Rough arcanite:

![rough arcanite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3d7f02d81e936d63bfb0e59e68b51a52f0cc075.png)

Obtaining: smelted from Amethyst powder

It's so squarish it almost looks like a brick... 

###  -Pure arcanite:

![pure arcanite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/020d3f395a7b4099b57df75ddf4f712e561cd674.png)

Obtaining: brewing a ghast tear on rough arcanite 

Ooh, shiny

###  -Pure arcanite bar:

![Pure arcanite bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8181f9476d1cdff7da5a3bbe28ccbd1519fd358.png)

Obtaining: exactly what it looks like, just two pure Arcanite stacked on each other

Ooohh, bigger shiny! 

###  -Arcanite longsword

![Pure arcanite longsword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/487d72ac4d64fa22b4b0108dc359d765624a9c15.png)

Obtaining: crafted from a Netherite sword, two Slimeball and two pure Arcanite bar

A long sword, with slow hits due to it's size, but also heavy damage for the same reason. Biggest shiny there is so far. May or may not have some additional effects ;)
</details>

Stay tuned as 1.2.1 is coming once I get it to work... (and also 1.2.2, 1.2.3 and 2.1)

🔌 Supported versions:

Forge 1.20.1

Other versions are planned for when the mod will add more and if there is some demand

Special thanks to Techdeck for helping me with ideas and feedback for the mod!

Ask me about the icon on discord (pyxal42)
